title: Pinch-zoom on a specific subarea (image lens)
design_brief: Pinch on an image reveals a magnifier circle.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Whole-image zoom (Apple Photos already does this)
mobile_reasoning: Pinch shows a Skia circular clip of scaled image at focal point.

title: Sheet with autocomplete dropdown
design_brief: Sheet with a search input that shows dropdown suggestions.
mobile_reasoning: Suggestions inside sheet, FlashList for scroll.

title: Virtualized day-view calendar
design_brief: Long day view (24 hours) with hour cells, virtualized.
mobile_reasoning: FlashList with 24 items; events overlaid via absolute position per hour.

title: Toggle row with description below
design_brief: Settings toggle row: label + description + Switch.
mobile_reasoning: Two-line layout with Switch on right.

title: Header search that expands inline
design_brief: Search icon in header expands inline to full-width search input.
mobile_reasoning: Header reflows; search input takes full width with auto-focus.

title: Snackbar with action button (undo)
design_brief: Material snackbar with optional action button. Reference: Gmail undo send.
mobile_reasoning: Toast variant with action button + 5s timer.

title: Animated route polyline (dashes flowing)
design_brief: Route polyline with dashes that flow forward (showing direction).
mobile_reasoning: Skia path with dashEffect; offset animates.

title: Audio visualizer for music playback
design_brief: Vertical bars react to audio frequencies.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-audio-recorder-player or native FFT. Bars via Skia.

title: Polygon overlay (delivery zone)
design_brief: Show delivery zone as a polygon overlay.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-maps Polygon with fillColor.

title: Compact stat card with sparkline
design_brief: Dashboard stat card: large number + sparkline + change %.
mobile_reasoning: Compact card with tabular nums.

title: Whiteboard / sticky-note aesthetic
design_brief: Sticky-note cards on a whiteboard background. Reference: Miro mobile.
mobile_reasoning: Yellow cards with slight rotations + paper-like background.

title: Pull-down notifications drawer behavior
design_brief: In-app notification center (NOT system).
mobile_reasoning: Use distinct UI; pull-down from header opens a panel.

title: Live-region announcements for chat messages
design_brief: New chat message announces via VoiceOver/TalkBack.
mobile_reasoning: AccessibilityInfo.announceForAccessibility on new message.

title: Re-render counter dev overlay
design_brief: Dev overlay showing how often a component re-renders.
mobile_reasoning: useRef counter incremented on render; overlay shows.
solution: // useRenderCount.ts\nimport {useRef} from 'react';\nexport function useRenderCount(name: string) { const c = useRef(0); c.current += 1; if (__DEV__) console.log(`[${name}] render #${c.current}`); return c.current; }

title: Audio track timeline with regions
design_brief: Audio editor with multiple selectable regions on a timeline. Reference: Voice Memos trim.
mobile_reasoning: Skia rects for regions + drag handles via Pan.

title: Map preview that animates from list cell
design_brief: Tap a list cell with a map preview → it animates to full screen map.
mobile_reasoning: Shared-element from rn-005 with map snapshot to live map.

title: Comparison chart (two stacked bars side by side)
design_brief: Two stacked bars (this period vs last period).
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Same color stacks (can't tell which is which)
mobile_reasoning: Two stacked bars from rn-130 side by side.

title: List items shift over on row delete
design_brief: When a row is deleted, others slide up smoothly.
mobile_reasoning: Layout.springify on each row.
solution: // See rn-019 — Layout.springify\nimport Animated, {Layout} from 'react-native-reanimated';\nexport function ShiftableRow({children}: {children: React.ReactNode}) { return <Animated.View layout={Layout.springify().damping(18)}>{children}</Animated.View>; }

title: Pie chart with labels and percentages
design_brief: Standard pie chart with per-slice labels and percentage.
mobile_reasoning: Skia arcs + text positioned at slice midpoint.

title: Wabi-sabi: imperfect, asymmetric, natural
design_brief: Japanese wabi-sabi: muted, imperfect, slightly asymmetric.
mobile_reasoning: Muted earth palette + slight rotation jitter on cards.

title: Swipe-back from any edge on iOS modal
design_brief: iOS modal screens accept swipe-down to dismiss.
mobile_reasoning: presentation:'modal' in Expo Router enables this natively.
solution: // Already covered in rn-055 — modal presentation gives free swipe-down dismiss on iOS\nimport {Stack} from 'expo-router';\nexport default function Layout() { return <Stack screenOptions={{presentation: 'modal'}}/>; }

title: Persistent mini player above tab bar
design_brief: Apple-Music-style mini player above tab bar, tap to expand to full.
mobile_reasoning: Sibling layer above tabs; tap promotes to sheet using rn-212 pattern.

title: FlashList with reorderable rows via long-press
design_brief: Combine FlashList virtualization with drag-reorder.
mobile_reasoning: Hybrid: use FlashList for non-drag scroll; switch to manual layout during drag mode.

title: Inline calendar event create row
design_brief: Calendar where tapping a time slot reveals inline event create form.
mobile_reasoning: Inline expandable row on tap.

title: Per-route header customization in Expo Router
design_brief: Each route has its own header config (title, right buttons, large title).
mobile_reasoning: Stack.Screen options + headerLargeTitle on iOS.

title: Validating input with debounced check icon
design_brief: Username field shows check/cross icon after debounced async validation.
mobile_reasoning: Debounce 400ms; show spinner during check, then check/cross on result.

title: Iridescent shader on hover/press
design_brief: Press surface shows iridescent shader.
mobile_reasoning: Skia Shader (RuntimeShader or LinearGradient) on press state.

title: Capture-on-tap with double-tap to switch camera
design_brief: Camera screen: tap shutter; double-tap to flip front/back.
mobile_reasoning: Gesture.Tap and double-tap composed.

title: Bottom sheet showing 'this place' detail when marker tapped
design_brief: Tap marker → bottom sheet with photos, reviews, etc.
mobile_reasoning: Combine rn-002 + map marker tap.

title: Polar area chart
design_brief: Polar area chart (like donut but slices with varying radius).
mobile_reasoning: Skia arcs with per-slice radius.
